SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology

Class DefaultTerminologyMapper

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology.DefaultTerminologyMapper
All Implemented Interfaces:
CodeValidator, ConceptTranslator, DemographicsMapper, DisplayNameResolver, GeoMapper, NamingSystemResolver, TerminologyLoader, TerminologyMapper, UnitMapper
public class DefaultTerminologyMapper extends Object implements TerminologyMapper
Default implementation of TerminologyMapper that delegates every method to the existing static utility classes (Systems, Mapping, Units, ISO3166, RaceAndEthnicity).

The result of every call through DefaultTerminologyMapper is identical to calling the equivalent static method directly. This class acts as the bridge between the new injectable TerminologyMapper interface and the legacy static utilities.

Dynamically loaded resources (via load(Resource)) are stored in per-instance maps and do not affect the shared static caches.

Author:
Audacious Inquiry
See Also:
  • TerminologyMapper
  • TerminologyMapperFactory

    • DefaultTerminologyMapper

      public DefaultTerminologyMapper()

  • Method Details

    • toUri

      public Optional<String> toUri(String oid)
      Returns the canonical URI for the given OID.

      Delegates to Systems.toUri(String).

      Specified by:
      toUri in interface NamingSystemResolver
      Parameters:
      oid - the OID to look up (e.g., "2.16.840.1.113883.6.1")
      Returns:
      the canonical URI, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • toOid

      public Optional<String> toOid(String uri)
      Returns the OID for the given canonical URI.

      Delegates to Systems.toOid(String).

      Specified by:
      toOid in interface NamingSystemResolver
      Parameters:
      uri - the URI to look up (e.g., "http://loinc.org")
      Returns:
      the OID, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • getNamingSystem

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.NamingSystem> getNamingSystem(String oidOrUriOrId)
      Resolves the diamond default: both NamingSystemResolver and TerminologyLoader declare getNamingSystem(String).

      Implementations should check both the OID/URI registry and the loaded-resource registry and return whichever matches. The default returns empty.

      Delegates to Systems.getNamingSystem(String).

      Specified by:
      getNamingSystem in interface NamingSystemResolver
      Specified by:
      getNamingSystem in interface TerminologyLoader
      Specified by:
      getNamingSystem in interface TerminologyMapper
      Parameters:
      oidOrUriOrId - an OID, canonical URI, or resource id
      Returns:
      the matching NamingSystem, or empty if not found

    • v2TableUri

      public String v2TableUri(String tableNameOrNumber)
      Returns the canonical FHIR URI for an HL7 V2 table.

      Input may be a bare number ("0001"), a prefixed table name ("HL70001"), or the full URI (returned unchanged). Example: "0001" → "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0001"

      Delegates to Mapping.mapTableNameToSystem(String), which resolves V2 table names, numeric table numbers, OIDs, and aliased URIs to their canonical FHIR system URI. Already-canonical URIs are returned unchanged. Returns null for blank input.

      Specified by:
      v2TableUri in interface NamingSystemResolver
      Parameters:
      tableNameOrNumber - the V2 table name or number
      Returns:
      the canonical FHIR CodeSystem URI for the table

    • normalizeSystem

      public String normalizeSystem(String system)
      Returns the preferred system URI for an identifier's assigning authority or system name.

      Converts V2 assigning authority names and OID-based system identifiers to their preferred FHIR Identifier system URIs. Returns the input unchanged if no mapping is known.

      Delegates to Mapping.mapSystem(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Identifier) via a temporary Identifier, which resolves V2 assigning authority names and OID-based system identifiers to their preferred FHIR Identifier system URIs. Returns the input unchanged if no mapping is known.

      Specified by:
      normalizeSystem in interface NamingSystemResolver
      Parameters:
      system - the raw system string from a V2 identifier field
      Returns:
      the preferred system URI; never null if input is non-null

    • mapCode

      public Optional<TranslationResult> mapCode(String mappingName, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding source)
      Applies the named concept map or mapping table to the source coding.

      This is the primary entry point for annotation-driven mapping from @ComesFrom(table=...) or @ComesFrom(map=...).

      Delegates to Mapping.getMapping(String) then Mapping.mapCode(Coding, boolean). Returns Optional.empty() if the mapping name is unknown or no mapping exists for the source code.

      Specified by:
      mapCode in interface ConceptTranslator
      Parameters:
      mappingName - the name of the concept map or V2 table (e.g., "0001", "USCoreRace")
      source - the coding to map
      Returns:
      the translation result, or Optional.empty() if no mapping is available

    • translate

      public Optional<TranslationResult> translate(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding source, String targetSystem)
      Translates the given source coding to the target code system using the best available concept map.

      Translation by source/target system pair is not directly supported by the current static mapping tables; this implementation always returns Optional.empty(). Override in a subclass or custom TerminologyMapper to provide real translation.

      Specified by:
      translate in interface ConceptTranslator
      Parameters:
      source - the coding to translate
      targetSystem - the target code system URI
      Returns:
      the translation result, or Optional.empty() if no mapping is available

    • getDisplay

      public Optional<String> getDisplay(String system, String code)
      Returns the preferred display text for the given code in the given system.

      Delegates to Mapping.getDisplay(String, String).

      Specified by:
      getDisplay in interface DisplayNameResolver
      Parameters:
      system - the code system URI
      code - the code
      Returns:
      the display text, or Optional.empty() if not registered

    • hasDisplay

      public boolean hasDisplay(String system, String code)
      Returns true if a display name is registered for the given code.

      Delegates to Mapping.hasDisplay(String, String).

      Specified by:
      hasDisplay in interface DisplayNameResolver
      Parameters:
      system - the code system URI
      code - the code
      Returns:
      true if a display is available; false otherwise

    • setDisplay

      public void setDisplay(String system, String code, String display)
      Registers or overrides the display name for the given code.

      The default implementation throws UnsupportedOperationException. Implementations that support a writable display registry should override this method.

      Registers the display by calling Mapping.updateCodeLookup(Coding).

      Specified by:
      setDisplay in interface DisplayNameResolver
      Parameters:
      system - the code system URI
      code - the code
      display - the display text to register

    • validateCode

      public boolean validateCode(String valueSetUri, String system, String code)
      Returns true if the given code is a valid member of the given code system within the named value set.

      Value-set membership validation is not supported by the current static utilities; this implementation always returns false. Override in a custom TerminologyMapper to provide real validation.

      Specified by:
      validateCode in interface CodeValidator
      Parameters:
      valueSetUri - the canonical URI of the value set
      system - the code system URI
      code - the code to validate
      Returns:
      true if valid; false if not valid or if the value set is unknown

    • mapUnit

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding> mapUnit(String unitCode)
      Maps a source unit code to a UCUM Coding with system "http://unitsofmeasure.org".

      Delegates to Units.toUcum(String).

      Specified by:
      mapUnit in interface UnitMapper
      Parameters:
      unitCode - the source unit string (e.g., "mg/dL")
      Returns:
      a UCUM coding, or Optional.empty() if the unit is unknown

    • mapRace

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Extension> mapRace(String code, String codeSystem)
      Maps a race code to a US Core race Extension.

      Constructs a CodeableConcept from the supplied code and system, delegates to RaceAndEthnicity.setRaceCode(CodeableConcept, Extension), and returns the populated extension. Returns Optional.empty() if the code is not recognised.

      Specified by:
      mapRace in interface DemographicsMapper
      Parameters:
      code - the race code (e.g., "2054-5")
      codeSystem - the code system for the race code (e.g., "urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.6.238")
      Returns:
      a US Core race extension, or Optional.empty() if the code is unknown

    • mapEthnicity

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Extension> mapEthnicity(String code, String codeSystem)
      Maps an ethnicity code to a US Core ethnicity Extension.

      Constructs a CodeableConcept from the supplied code and system, delegates to RaceAndEthnicity.setEthnicityCode(CodeableConcept, Extension), and returns the populated extension. Returns Optional.empty() if the code is not recognised.

      Specified by:
      mapEthnicity in interface DemographicsMapper
      Parameters:
      code - the ethnicity code
      codeSystem - the code system for the ethnicity code
      Returns:
      a US Core ethnicity extension, or Optional.empty() if the code is unknown

    • lookupCountry

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding> lookupCountry(String code, String codeSystem)
      Returns an ISO 3166 country Coding for the given code and code system.

      Delegates to ISO3166.twoLetterCode(String) and ISO3166.name(String). Returns Optional.empty() if the code is not recognised.

      Specified by:
      lookupCountry in interface GeoMapper
      Parameters:
      code - the country code (e.g., "US")
      codeSystem - the code system (e.g., "urn:iso:std:iso:3166")
      Returns:
      a country coding, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • normalizeCountry

      public Optional<String> normalizeCountry(String nameOrCode)
      Normalizes a country name or variant spelling to an ISO 3166 alpha-2 code.

      Delegates to ISO3166.twoLetterCode(String).

      Specified by:
      normalizeCountry in interface GeoMapper
      Parameters:
      nameOrCode - the country name or code variant (e.g., "United States")
      Returns:
      the ISO 3166 alpha-2 code (e.g., "US"), or Optional.empty() if not found

    • load

      public void load(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource resource)
      Registers a FHIR terminology resource (NamingSystem, ConceptMap, CodeSystem, or ValueSet).

      The default implementation throws UnsupportedOperationException. Implementations that support dynamic loading should override this method.

      Supported resource types and their handling:

      • NamingSystem — registered in the shared Systems naming system registry
      • ConceptMap — stored in a per-instance map; retrievable via getConceptMap(String)
      • CodeSystem — stored in a per-instance map; retrievable via getCodeSystem(String)
      • ValueSet — stored in a per-instance map; retrievable via getValueSet(String)
      Specified by:
      load in interface TerminologyLoader
      Parameters:
      resource - the resource to load; must be one of the four supported types
      Throws:
      TerminologyException - if resource is null or an unsupported type

    • getConceptMap

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ConceptMap> getConceptMap(String id)
      Returns the ConceptMap resource registered under the given identifier.

      Checks the per-instance loaded map first, then falls back to the Units.CONCEPT_MAP_ID resource owned by Units (if the id matches), and finally to the static Mapping registry via Mapping.getMapping(String) and Mapping.asConceptMap().

      Specified by:
      getConceptMap in interface TerminologyLoader
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • getCodeSystem

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeSystem> getCodeSystem(String id)
      Returns the CodeSystem resource registered under the given identifier.

      Checks the per-instance loaded map first, then attempts to retrieve via the NamingSystem user-data cache in Systems.

      Specified by:
      getCodeSystem in interface TerminologyLoader
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found

    • getValueSet

      public Optional<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ValueSet> getValueSet(String id)
      Returns the ValueSet resource registered under the given identifier.

      Checks the per-instance loaded map first, then falls back to the Units.VALUE_SET_ID resource owned by Units (if the id matches).

      Specified by:
      getValueSet in interface TerminologyLoader
      Parameters:
      id - the resource id
      Returns:
      the resource, or Optional.empty() if not found
